notifications.title: Kind Attention to the Institutions: The Web Portal is open for applying for Revaluation of Answer Scripts (Nov./Dec. 2025 Examinations – UG/PG/Ph.D) from 16-04-2026 to 21-04-2026. The Web Portal will be closed at 5:00 PM on 21-04-2026.Click Here

Distance Education:- Web Portal is opened for Applying Revaluation of Answer Script(August / September 2025 Examinations) from 25-03-2026 to 30-03-2026 through study centre only. The Web Portal will be closed on 30-03-2026.Click Here

Kind Attention to the Institutions:The results of the Nov./Dec. 2025 Examinations (UG/PG/Ph.D.) have been published.Students who wish to apply for a photocopy of their answer scripts should submit their requests through their respective colleges on or before 24.03.2026 (Tuesday), 5:00 PM.The last date has been extended up to 26.03.2026 (Thursday), 11:00 AM.Click Here
